class.name: ModifyAndroidBuildTemplatePlugin
class.brief_description: Editor plugin for installing FMOD Android libraries into the Android build template.
class.description: ModifyAndroidBuildTemplatePlugin is an editor-only plugin that simplifies the installation of FMOD Android libraries into Godot's Android build template. It provides a GUI for selecting the FMOD Android API folder and automatically copies the required files (fmod.jar and native libraries) to the correct locations. This plugin adds a menu item "Install FMOD Android Libraries" to the editor's Tools menu. When activated, it: 1. Checks if the Android build template is installed 2. Prompts for the FMOD Android API folder location 3. Copies fmod.jar to the libs folder 4. Copies native libraries for all supported architectures (arm64-v8a, armeabi-v7a, x86, x86_64) 5. Creates separate debug and release configurations [b]Note:[/b] This is an editor-only class and is not available in exported projects.
